name: Spicy Hot Sichuan Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Red hot pepper oil (or more)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all sauce ingredients together in a small bowl and set aside.
2. Heat oil in a nonstick pan or wok; brown ginger root.
3. Add tofu and 1 tablespoon soy sauce; stir gently and occasionally for 2 minutes.
4. Add chopped mushrooms and water chestnuts; stir gently for 2 minutes.
5. Add minced green onions and sauce mixture; stir for 1 minute. Serve hot.
